_comment: This is a TEMPLATE with placeholder dates/titles, not real listings. Copy this file to events.manual.json and replace the entries below with concerts/theater/stand-up/etc you actually know about. venueKey must match one of the keys in ISTANBUL_VENUES (backend/lib.js): vodafone-park, rams-park, sukru-saracoglu, ulker-sports-arena, sinan-erdem, zorlu-psm, kucukciftlik-park, crr, harbiye-acikhava, akm, tuyap.
title: PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real event title
PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real event title
PLACEHOLDER — you can also skip venueKey and give lat/lng directly for a venue not in the list
